Ntc Of Mtn For A Stay Of Proceedings And Req. For Protective Order
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. FRANCISCO X. MARQUEZ, TEL. NO. (408) 236-2270 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. MICHAEL E. BROWN, TEL. NO. 439-8822 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANTS HAROLD FOURNIER, MICHAEL BECK AND PETER HANSEN'S Motion For A Stay Of Proceedings And Request For Protective Order, stay granted without prejudice as to FURTHER motions after an arbitrator has determined the parties and issues involved in the arbitration. Request for Protective order is moot and off calendar as filed in the wrong department. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/AL
